text: I find myself at the intersection of technology and curiosity—a room full of people gathered for a presentation, perhaps a seminar or workshop. There is an air of anticipation and collective purpose. Moving into the next room, I am greeted by vibrant colors and bold text celebrating research and innovation. Surrounded by exhibits about human and machine collaboration, I feel inspired and contemplative. The environment urges me to reflect on how progress is both an individual and collective endeavor, inviting awe, questions, and the quiet thrill of discovery.
